The '''Battle of Tar Morden''' took place on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Tar Morden]] towards the end of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==The battle==
During the battle, [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] forces captured tens of thousands of [[Techno Union/Legends|Techno Union]]–built [[LM-432 crab droid/Legends|LM-432 crab droids]] from a factory.

==Aftermath==
The captured [[Droid/Legends|droids]] were later used for live fire training sessions in the [[Imperial Academy/Legends|Imperial Academy]]. These droids were among the inspirations for the later [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Mountain Terrain Armored Transport|MT-AT]] [[Walker/Legends|walker]].
